2026-03-16.patch_summary: This patch renames the function sunrpc_cache_pipe_upcall() to sunrpc_cache_upcall() in preparation for its future use of netlink for upcalls, if configured. The rename is applied across four files: fs/nfsd/export.c, include/linux/sunrpc/cache.h, net/sunrpc/cache.c, and net/sunrpc/svcauth_unix.c. The function's behavior remains unchanged, but the name reflects its expanding capabilities.
